title: Craftable Ominous Key Recipe
description: Now you can craft Ominous Key and claim your mace
body:
# Craftable Ominous Keys

**Summon the Shadows, Skip the Setup**

Tired of triggering raids or chasing ominous events just to earn a single Ominous Key? Same. This datapack lets you craft your own gateway to danger — no banners, no buildup, just instant access to the chaos.

Note: “Ominous Key Recipe” is a custom recipe added by the datapack.If you want craftable trial keys and craftabale Vaults cheack out the links below.

**> 🧠 Why It’s Better **
> Because thrill-seekers shouldn’t be gatekept. Whether you're farming rare loot, testing your limits, or just want to dive into the most intense Trial Chambers, this pack gives you the key to darkness — on demand.

**📦 How to Use:**

1. Download the .zip
  
2. Drop it into your world’s datapacks/ folde

3. Type /reload in-game
 
4. Craft your Ominous Key and embrace the challenge
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
